description: You are logged into 2N Access Commander at https://localhost:9443 as admin (password: 2n). BuildingTech Solutions has installed a License Plate Recognition (LPR) camera. Grant automated parking access to IT Department members Kwame Asante and Mei-Ling Zhang by adding license plates 'XYZ-1234' and 'ABC-9876' to their respective profiles. CRITICAL: Do NOT delete, overwrite, or modify their existing RFID cards during this process.
